response.text:
Verified minimal connect flow for an MSO4/5/6 scope over pyvisa.

ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Connect to the selected scope, verify communication with a source-of-truth validated *IDN? query, then disconnect cleanly.","findings":["Built a compact verified connect flow using the TekAutomate connect/query/disconnect schema.","Verified SCPI query syntax for identity readback is exactly *IDN? for MSO4/5/6 Series."],"suggestedFixes":[],"actions":[{"type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":["SCOPE"],"printIdn":true}},{"type":"query","label":"Read Result","params":{"command":"*IDN?","saveAs":"scope_idn"}},{"type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":["SCOPE"]}}]}

actionsJson.summary: Connect to the selected scope, verify communication with a source-of-truth validated *IDN? query, then disconnect cleanly.
findings: Built a compact verified connect flow using the TekAutomate connect/query/disconnect schema.
Verified SCPI query syntax for identity readback is exactly *IDN? for MSO4/5/6 Series.
